</mxCell> <mxCell id="8be7dEwbe0AuUS0FuVEA-3" value="<div style="">根据 VMA 语义分流</div><div style=""><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">vma.kind + flags&nbsp;</span></div><div style=""><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">+ fault type</span><span style="font-size: 0px; text-wrap: nowrap; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); font-family: monospace; background-color: transparent;">vma.kind + flags + fault type</span><br></div>" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="920" y="160" width="160" height="99" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8be7dEwbe0AuUS0FuVEA-4" value="<b>此时通常只更新 VMA 元数据；</b><div><b>PTE 可以暂时为空，不立即分配物理页。</b></div>" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;darkOpacity=0.05;fillColor=#e51400;strokeColor=#B20000;fontSize=12;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="75" y="613.5" width="275" height="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8be7dEwbe0AuUS0FuVEA-5" value="<b style="font-size: 13px;">VMA 是所有分流的依据</b><br style="font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700;"><span style="font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700;">缺页处理不猜测来源；</span><div><span style="font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700;">根据命中的 VMA 语义选择装页策略。</span></div>" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;darkOpacity=0.05;fillColor=#e51400;strokeColor=#B20000;fontSize=12;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="475" y="740" width="275" height="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8be7dEwbe0AuUS0FuVEA-9" value="" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;labelBackgroundColor=none;labelPosition=left;verticalLabelPosition=middle;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-0.0169" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1610" y="619" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1610" y="650" as="targetPoint" /> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8be7dEwbe0AuUS0FuVEA-15" value="<font style="font-size: 19px;"><b style="">图例</b><br><span style="background-color: rgb(255, 242, 204);">VMA&amp;PTE&nbsp;</span>：VMA元数据与页表</font><div><font style="font-size: 19px;"><span style="background-color: rgb(225, 213, 231);">PrivatePage </span>：匿名/私有物化页<br><span style="background-color: rgb(213, 232, 212);"> CachePage </span>：文件页缓存</font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#999999;strokeWidth=1.2;arcSize=8;fontSize=12;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="770" width="350" height="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8be7dEwbe0AuUS0FuVEA-17" value="<br><div><span style="font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700;">赖分配、COW、PageCache实现；</span></div><div><span style="font-size: 13px; 18));">只在必要时发生复制、修改</span><br></div>" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;darkOpacity=0.05;fillColor=#e51400;strokeColor=#B20000;fontSize=12;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1"
